mdRecord.dcterms:title: Andrew Jackson Rutrough Cemetery
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Located in a large field 600 yards south of driveway entrance to 630 Stonewall Rd. NE on property under the care of David A. Whitlock. Visible using Google Earth. Floyd County GIS Parcel # 31-30 N 36 59.257' W 80 14.042'
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Lists
Cemeteries
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
